workContext.summary: Founder of Haraya, a clothing brand under BookiStudios. Currently working on defining the brand's specs and design, which is Filipino-inspired streetwear with elegance and class.

personalContext.summary: Also known as Muhabuki. Creative director for the brand Haraya. User is Filipino.

topOfMind.summary: Seeking feedback on the specs and design of the Haraya clothing line. Focused on refining the brand identity and product details, specifically a Filipino-inspired streetwear design with elegance and class. Tagline: 'fruits of one imagination'. Collaborating with marketing lead Diane.

recentMonths.summary: User has specified that the Haraya design is Filipino-inspired streetwear with elegance and class, and confirmed personal Filipino ethnicity.

facts.content: User is Adrien (Muhabuki), founder of the clothing brand Haraya.
Haraya is a clothing brand under BookiStudios.
Tagline of Haraya: 'fruits of one imagination'.
Diane is the marketing lead for Haraya.
Haraya's design direction is Filipino-inspired streetwear with elegance and class.
